text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: There! ☆ It's perfect now! ♪ Come look, everybody!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! We're eating outside?!
It's so cold!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry! We'll get warmed up plenty when we have our snowball
fight! ☆ Everyone who's playing, this way! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Eat up! The fans made it all... It's really good. I recommend the stew.
I'm on my thirtieth bowl now.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! That's too much, Oguri! ☆ But keep eating more and more! ★
Into the black hole it goes! ☆★

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
We knew we had to make plenty since Oguri was coming! Have as
much as you want, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That's great, but... why do I have to dress up like Santa too? How
many outfits did Mayano and Marvelous bring? And what are they
even doing on this mountain?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Best not to worry about it. You do look good as Santa. You're simply adorable.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wha?! That's it, I'm taking this off!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geez, Hayahide. I don't know if it's the holiday spirit or what, but you do realize you sound like a weird old man, right?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
How unflattering... Why don't you put that Santa outfit back on to
brighten your spirits? I want to send Ticket a picture of us.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Seeing as how she didn't make it in time...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't say so just yet. Listen, you hear that? Those annoying
footsteps...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I do hear it. Hah... It seems the miracles keep coming.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, that was best! I'm so glad everyone got to have their party,
Marvey. ♪

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! ☆ We even got to see the big star! And just when I thought the
miracles were done...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oguri's big takeoff blew me away! ☆ My heart's filled to bursting! ★
Just like my stomach! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, and did you see the look on her fans' faces? It was like they
were lost in a dream... Totally entranced by her!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
One time I did this ad, with these super cool actors, right? And their
fans had the exact same look.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I still have this feeling though... I want us to put a marvelous smile on
everyone's faces too. ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: So what do you think? ☆ Should... Should we do it too?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oooh! That's genius, Marvey! ♪ Totally, let's do it! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It'll be so exciting and dreamy and... sparkly! Let's gather a bunch of
presents to give to all the good kids!

text_block_list.name: Mayano & Marvelous
text_block_list.text: Just like the real Santa! ♪

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you going outside, Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I want to see the stars.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text: Ah, of course! Take care not to catch a cold!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ahh... This is nice. The stars are shining both down here and up there.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tonight was really fun. I got to know how everyone feels...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
(I learned something—why I was so happy during the holidays when I
was little. Because I got to make Santa happy by winning.)

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
You gave us an incredible moment. Seeing you soar through the air
like that, I instantly recalled the excitement of first watching you race.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text:
And now I'm certain. In your next race... you're going to show us an
even greater miracle than you did today.

text_block_list.name: Head Fan
text_block_list.text: You're amazing, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There's a way I can thank everyone for today. I finally... thought of
the best present to give them...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: A miracle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several days after the party...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
There! Oguri's going up! She's going, she's going! Oguri Cap is in the
lead!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
(I want to wow them with my racing... I want to delight them... excite
them! That's the present that only I can give!)

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
(Watch me... I'm Oguri Cap! And I'm going to make another miracle
happen!)

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Haaaaaagh!
As long as you keep on wishing... the miracles will never end.
